name: Elements of Truth
description: Elements of Truth is a confidence-betting trivia game by Veritasium — across ten questions, the rotating Question Reader reads a card aloud and every other player simultaneously commits one of their ten numbered confidence tokens (1 through 10) face-down on the answer they believe is correct. Each token can be used only once, so high numbers go on questions you're sure of and low numbers hedge against the unknown. Right answer? Token moves to your scoring pile. Wrong answer? Token is gone for good. Highest sum after ten questions wins. Quick, surprisingly tense, and shaped by how brave you let yourself be.
